gitCommit.subject: ci: adiciona Gate 5 — supabase-security-gate.yml (SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN)
gitCommit.body:
ci: adiciona Gate 5 — supabase-security-gate.yml (SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN)

4 checks de segurança em PRs que tocam supabase/migrations:
1. supabase db lint (idempotencia, sintaxe)
2. Auditoria SECURITY DEFINER (search_path obrigatorio)
3. Smoke test RPC get_profile_and_roles (exists, SECDEF, statement_timeout)
4. Verifica anon nao tem EXECUTE na RPC

Secrets necessarios: SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN, SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
(configurar em Settings > Secrets > Actions)"
